name: Escanor
description:
__Race:__ Human
__Height:__ 165-325 cm (5'5"-10'8")

A member of the Seven Deadly Sins and is known as Lion's Sin of Pride. He is renowned for gaining immense power during the day, and gradually becoming weaker with the setting of the sun, leaving him frail and submissive at night. His Sacred Treasure is the Divine Axe Rhitta. His inherent power is named Sunshine.
